alfred.description: Unified gateway to 300+ LLMs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Meta, Mistral, DeepSeek, Qwen, ...) via OpenRouter's OpenAI-compatible API. One API key, pay-per-token, automatic provider routing.

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.description: Your OpenRouter API key. Get one at https://openrouter.ai/keys.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.description: OpenRouter API base URL. Override only if proxying through a custom gateway.

appName.label: App name
appName.description: Sent as the X-Title header. Shows up in OpenRouter's leaderboard for app attribution.

siteUrl.label: Site URL
siteUrl.description: Sent as the HTTP-Referer header. Optional but recommended for OpenRouter analytics.

modelFilter.label: Model filter (vendor)
modelFilter.description: Limit the model picker to a vendor. Leave empty to expose every OpenRouter model. The value is matched as a substring of the model id (e.g. 'deepseek/' keeps deepseek/* only). Vendors are not hardcoded — the live catalog from GET /models defines what's available; call the 'listVendors' action for the current set.

freeOnly.label: Free models only
freeOnly.description: When enabled, only models with a ':free' suffix are exposed. Useful while exploring without burning credits.

modelsCacheMinutes.label: Models cache (minutes)
modelsCacheMinutes.description: How long the model list returned by GET /models is cached. OpenRouter's catalog is stable; 60min is a safe default.

sttPrompt.label: STT prompt
sttPrompt.description: Optional override for the system-style instruction sent with each transcription request. Leave empty to use the built-in 'transcribe verbatim, no commentary' prompt. The STT model itself is picked from Settings → Models → Voice — not here — so the catalog of audio-capable OpenRouter models stays in one place.

top_p.label: Top-P
top_p.description: Nucleus sampling cutoff (0.9 is a common default).

top_k.label: Top-K
top_k.description: Top-K sampling cutoff. Not all upstream providers honor this — OpenRouter forwards it when supported.

frequency_penalty.label: Frequency penalty
frequency_penalty.description: Penalize new tokens based on their frequency in the text so far.

presence_penalty.label: Presence penalty
presence_penalty.description: Penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far.

max_tokens.label: Max output tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate. Leave empty to let the upstream provider decide.

seed.label: Seed
seed.description: Deterministic seed. Only honored by upstream providers that support it.

reasoning_effort.label: Reasoning effort
reasoning_effort.description: For reasoning models (o3, o4-mini, claude-sonnet-4 thinking, ...). 'low' = faster/cheaper, 'high' = deeper but slower.

provider_order.label: Provider order
provider_order.description: Comma-pinning of upstream providers OpenRouter should try first (e.g. 'anthropic', 'together'). Empty = auto-route.

allow_fallbacks.label: Allow fallbacks
allow_fallbacks.description: Let OpenRouter fall back to other providers if the pinned ones fail. Disable for strict provider control.

transforms_middle_out.label: Middle-out compression
transforms_middle_out.description: Apply OpenRouter's middle-out compression when the prompt exceeds the model's context. Drops middle messages and keeps system + recent turns.
